{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/technology-combinations/combinations/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. combinations

_Файлов:_ 35

h2. Содержание

* [01-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura-svyazi-pattern.md|01-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura-svyazi-pattern.md] — 
* [02-multiagentnyy-khaos-reshenie-auto-ai-router.md|02-multiagentnyy-khaos-reshenie-auto-ai-router.md] — 
* [03-crdt-local-first-svyazi-cardindex.md|03-crdt-local-first-svyazi-cardindex.md] — 
* [04-parsing-s-llm-graph-rag-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura.md|04-parsing-s-llm-graph-rag-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura.md] — 
* [05-sourcecraft-cli-claude-code-sequential-protokol-dochkinoy.md|05-sourcecraft-cli-claude-code-sequential-protokol-dochkinoy.md] — 
* [06-openclaude-utyokshiy-claude-code-zinc-inference-engine-mome-.md|06-openclaude-utyokshiy-claude-code-zinc-inference-engine-mome-.md] — 
* [07-crawl4ai-docling-yodoca-consolidator.md|07-crawl4ai-docling-yodoca-consolidator.md] — 
* [08-conductor-adversarial-review-auto-ai-router.md|08-conductor-adversarial-review-auto-ai-router.md] — 
* [09-agent-orchestration-stack.md|09-agent-orchestration-stack.md] — 
* [10-legal-document-intelligence-pipeline.md|10-legal-document-intelligence-pipeline.md] — 
* [11-hybrid-crdt-sql-database.md|11-hybrid-crdt-sql-database.md] — 
* [12-multi-agent-observability-stack.md|12-multi-agent-observability-stack.md] — 
* [13-legal-document-transpiler.md|13-legal-document-transpiler.md] — 
* [14-local-first-agent-development-environment.md|14-local-first-agent-development-environment.md] — 
* [15-self-consolidating-legal-corpus.md|15-self-consolidating-legal-corpus.md] — 
* [16-adversarial-multi-agent-code-review.md|16-adversarial-multi-agent-code-review.md] — 
* [17-distributed-agent-memory-with-graph.md|17-distributed-agent-memory-with-graph.md] — 
* [18-llm-powered-legal-corpus-builder.md|18-llm-powered-legal-corpus-builder.md] — 
* [19-multi-agent-observability-platform.md|19-multi-agent-observability-platform.md] — 
* [20-hybrid-olap-oltp-with-real-time-sync.md|20-hybrid-olap-oltp-with-real-time-sync.md] — 
* [21-legal-corpus-analytics-at-scale.md|21-legal-corpus-analytics-at-scale.md] — 
* [22-russian-international-oss-stack.md|22-russian-international-oss-stack.md] — 
* [23-security-first-code-review-pipeline.md|23-security-first-code-review-pipeline.md] — 
* [24-mega-integration-full-stack.md|24-mega-integration-full-stack.md] — 
* [25-legal-dsl-code-transpiler.md|25-legal-dsl-code-transpiler.md] — 
* [26-ast-based-code-analysis-for-legal-automation.md|26-ast-based-code-analysis-for-legal-automation.md] — 
* [27-hybrid-rag-with-ast-chunked-code.md|27-hybrid-rag-with-ast-chunked-code.md] — 
* [28-pydantic-enforced-legal-workflows.md|28-pydantic-enforced-legal-workflows.md] — 
* [29-meta-programmatic-legal-template-generator.md|29-meta-programmatic-legal-template-generator.md] — 
* [30-mega-stack-3-0-with-dsl-ast.md|30-mega-stack-3-0-with-dsl-ast.md] — 
* [31-event-sourced-legal-document-history.md|31-event-sourced-legal-document-history.md] — 
* [32-consensus-based-multi-agent-coordination.md|32-consensus-based-multi-agent-coordination.md] — > [!TIP]
* [33-event-sourcing-cqrs-clickhouse-analytics.md|33-event-sourcing-cqrs-clickhouse-analytics.md] — 
* [34-distributed-event-store-with-paxos.md|34-distributed-event-store-with-paxos.md] — 
* [35-mega-stack-4-0-with-event-sourcing-consensus.md|35-mega-stack-4-0-with-event-sourcing-consensus.md] — > [!TIP]



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [components-by-name|docs/glossary/components-by-name.md] (сходство 0.27)
* [15-19-extended|docs/technology-combinations/synthesis-tables/15-19-extended.md] (сходство 0.24)
* [09-14-extended|docs/technology-combinations/synthesis-tables/09-14-extended.md] (сходство 0.22)
